# Non-English Wikipedia Support

## What
Test and document the engine against non-English Wikipedias (de.wikipedia.org, fr.wikipedia.org, ja.wikipedia.org, etc.). The `--api` flag already accepts any MediaWiki endpoint, so the architecture supports this. This task is about verification: run the full analyze pipeline against non-English pages, document any parser edge cases, and add integration tests.

## Why
Varia's `--api` flag is designed for any MediaWiki instance, but the analyzers were built and tested against English Wikipedia. Non-English wikis expose edge cases: RTL languages, non-ASCII section headers, CJK citation formats, languages without sentence-boundary punctuation. Without verification, claims of cross-language support are untested.

## Context
Read first:
- `packages/cli/src/commands/analyze.ts` — the analyze pipeline
- `packages/analyzers/src/wikitext-parser.ts` — stripWikitext, extractHeadingMap, etc.
- `packages/analyzers/src/claim-differ.ts` — fuzzyFindClaim, classifyClaimChange
- `packages/analyzers/src/citation-tracker.ts` — extractCitations, diffCitations

## Implementation
1. For each target language (de, fr, ja, ar):
   - Run `wikihistory analyze <page> --api <lang>.wikipedia.org/w/api.php` on 3-5 pages
   - Verify all event types are detected (especially claims, citations, sections)
   - Document any failures or strange output
2. Fix parser edge cases found:
   - CJK text: no spaces between words affects sentence splitting
   - Arabic/Hebrew: RTL rendering, different punctuation
   - German: capitalized nouns, compound words, different citation templates
3. Add integration tests that run against non-English APIs
4. Update documentation with language support notes

## Invariants
- No architecture changes — only parser hardening
- All existing English tests still pass
- New tests are integration (hit live API, 30s timeout)

## Acceptance
- [ ] German Wikipedia: analyze 3 pages, all event types detected
- [ ] French Wikipedia: analyze 3 pages, all event types detected
- [ ] Japanese Wikipedia: analyze 3 pages, all event types detected
- [ ] Arabic Wikipedia: analyze 3 pages, all event types detected
- [ ] Documentation updated with known limitations per language
- [ ] Gate: build, lint, typecheck, test
